channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Unique Research for Heute, 19–26 March 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Unique Research for Heute, 19–26 March 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/austrian_ep_polls/2026-03-26-UniqueResearch.html
